ablation_rows.expected_effect: all current P8 evidence is present and auditable
without retrieval evidence, expected local-stat lemma recall is not audited
without SFT examples, the system has no domain-adaptation trace data
without DPO pairs, the prover lacks Lean-labeled contrast against invalid premises
without process rewards, training falls back to sparse proof-complete feedback only
without curation, generated lemmas could bypass duplicate, non-vacuity, or reuse checks

components.disabled_effect: without retrieval evidence, expected local-stat lemma recall is not audited
components.enabled_evidence: held-out baseline mean premise recall is 1.000 from expected-premise usage rows

components.disabled_effect: without SFT examples, the system has no domain-adaptation trace data
components.enabled_evidence: 73 verified no-placeholder SFT examples are present in the manifest

components.disabled_effect: without DPO pairs, the prover lacks Lean-labeled contrast against invalid premises
components.enabled_evidence: 73 chosen/rejected DPO pairs are present; 73 rejected attempts are Lean-labeled

components.disabled_effect: without process rewards, training falls back to sparse proof-complete feedback only
components.enabled_evidence: 76 GRPO process-reward tasks expose 11 reward components

components.disabled_effect: without curation, generated lemmas could bypass duplicate, non-vacuity, or reuse checks
components.enabled_evidence: 9/9 proposal, non-vacuity, and proof-cost gates pass; 3 placeholder-ledger entries remain blocked from library promotion

notes: P8.M3 report: artifact-backed ablation readiness for retrieval, SFT, DPO, Lean process reward, and curation. This is an auditable system component ablation scaffold, not a trained-model performance claim.
